subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Upon thee be My glory! The loftiest pinnacle, the ultimate goal, and the supreme horizon—such is the station whereof the Mother Book doth speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی ذروه علیا و غایه قصوی و افق اعلی مقامیست که ام الکتاب ناطق
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of prayer, @service to others; to the Cause of God
